# assets.images { #app.assets.images }

`assets.images`

Media utility assets and client-side JavaScript injection pipelines.

Resolves local storage paths for bird imagery and injects HTML/JavaScript 
engines for interactive photo lightboxes and audio spectrograms.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [get_sidebar_image_path](#app.assets.images.get_sidebar_image_path) | Resolve the web asset path and directory name for a species sidebar image. |
| [lightbox_script](#app.assets.images.lightbox_script) | Generate the HTML and JavaScript script block for the image gallery lightbox. |

### get_sidebar_image_path { #app.assets.images.get_sidebar_image_path }

```python
assets.images.get_sidebar_image_path(species_id, common_name)
```

Resolve the web asset path and directory name for a species sidebar image.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name        | Type   | Description                                       | Default    |
|-------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------|------------|
| species_id  | str    | The unique species alpha-numeric identifier code. | _required_ |
| common_name | str    | The English common name of the bird species.      | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                        | Description                                                               |
|--------|-----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | tuple of (str, str) or None | A tuple of (relative_web_url, folder_name) if an image exists, else None. |

### lightbox_script { #app.assets.images.lightbox_script }

```python
assets.images.lightbox_script()
```

Generate the HTML and JavaScript script block for the image gallery lightbox.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                                                   |
|--------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | HTML   | A raw HTML tag containing the client-side modal and gallery navigation logic. |
